name: 20"x32" Open Plaid Bath Rug Green/Cream - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Woven Cotton, Machine Washable
description:
Update your bathroom floor with this Open Plaid Bath Rug from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This rectangular bath rug features an olive green open plaid pattern on a cream backdrop for a chic look. Made from woven-textured material, this handmade rug feels soft and comfortable underfoot. Plus, this lightweight bath rug is easily machine washable. Place it in front of your bathtub, shower or sink for functional style.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
